rulings.Case Title: CONSERVATORSHIP OF MARIA A ESAIN
rulings.Calendar Matter: ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #5, Report, Fees
rulings.Rulings: Continued to 10/6/20. The proof of service filed on 9/1/20 is incomplete at item 2. The account does not show any liabilities. Reimbursements to the conservator do not reflect who the original payee was. There were additional purchases of funds not previously approved. No reconciliation is shown for the cash on hand in the account and the balance on the bank statement. The attorney time records do not show the names of the billing parties, only initials. Several of the attorney's costs advanced do not indicate what was filed or filed and returned and there appears to be a duplicate entry on 7/3/18.

rulings.Calendar Matter: PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
rulings.Rulings: Grant without hearing. $20,000 bond required. Status of filing the I&A is set for 1/13/21.
